title: Regional divide
description: London GVA per head as a multiple of the UK average
producer: ONS, Regional gross value added (balanced) per head
measure: London GVA per head as a multiple of the UK average

provenance.source: ONS, Regional gross value added (balanced) per head
provenance.methodology: Ratio of London GVA per head to the UK average (London ÷ UK), per year. Higher = wider regional gap.
provenance.derivation: Ratio of London GVA per head to the UK average (London ÷ UK), per year. Higher = wider regional gap.

freshnessReason: Latest observed period 2023 is older than the expected annual cadence projection 2024-12-31; latest source fetch recorded 2026-07-02.
limitations: Govviz is a downstream compiler, not the primary publisher.
